title: lindsaea retusa
intro: Lindsaea retusa, also known as the Rigid Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Lindsaea retusa can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
